page_content:
CHIN611 Structure of the Chinese Language (3 Credits)

An overview of the basic linguistic characteristics of modern standard (Mandarin) Chinese, including phonology, morphology and syntax. Emphasis on the analysis of functional linguistic models and

the development of student skills in critically appraising existing interpretations of Chinese language structure.

CHIN621 Chinese Historical Linguistics (3 Credits) An introduction to the origin and development of the Chinese language, and its relationship to other languages.
